name: Sanford Bishop
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $290,306 for Sanford Bishop in U.S. House, GA-02. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
